get.description:
Health check endpoint to verify API is running.
No authentication required.

Readiness check for Kubernetes.
Returns 200 when the app is ready to handle requests.

enum: Domain expert (urban planning, climate, energy, insurance, etc.)
job_role.title: Job Role

job_role_other.title: Job Role Other
job_role_other.description: Required when job_role is 'Other'. Provide the user's custom role.

date.title: Date
date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (past or present only)

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: List of analysis types to perform. Choose one or more from: geographic, environmental, urban, events, anthropogenic

details.message: API key is required in request headers

detail.msg: Input should be less than or equal to 90
Input should be greater than or equal to -180
Value error, Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
Value error, filter_type=2 (multiple hours) only supports same-day analysis. end_date must be the same as start_date or left empty
List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0
